item.name: Hellsnow Shark
item.description:
Those who lay eyes upon this Turali tornado shark tend to utter obscenities in fear of it─which may well be how it obtained its modern moniker.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: It is said that a traveling Eorzean angler once spied a school of these airborne sharks while crossing Zorgor the Boundless. Deathly afeared of the wavekin's Abalathian cousins, the angler cried, “Oh, hells no!”─an utterance rarely used in Tural─and promptly ran the other way. Witnesses to this event assumed he was referring to the sharks, and thus was history written.
